title: symplocos robinsonii var. angustifolia
intro: Symplocos robinsonii var. angustifolia, also known as the Philippine alisana, is a variety of plant species within the Symplocos genus. It is native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Traditionally, Symplocos robinsonii var. angustifolia is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it may also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
